description.name: Marina View Apartment
description.headline: Award-winning marina apartment, voted best in Valencia
description.description:
The #1 rated apartment in the whole city! Our award-winning interior design has been featured in major magazines. Enjoy a free welcome bottle of champagne and complimentary airport pickup on every stay.

Two bedrooms and two bathrooms overlook the marina, with a balcony for watching the boats. Walk to the beach in five minutes.

reviews: Lovely views over the marina and very close to the beach. The balcony was our favourite spot.
Comfortable two-bed apartment, clean and well located. Parking was handy.
